questions.question: Should parents avoid giving peanuts to infants to prevent peanut allergies?
questions.rationale: LEAP trial findings directly contradict long-standing parental beliefs about allergen avoidance - major paradigm shift not yet fully adopted by public
questions.misinformation_narrative: Many parents still believe they should avoid giving peanuts to babies to prevent allergies, despite evidence showing early introduction reduces allergy risk
questions.public_stakes: Continued avoidance of early allergen introduction perpetuates the very problem parents are trying to prevent, increasing allergy rates
questions.verification_reason: Parenting forums, older pediatric advice, and many grandparents still advocate peanut avoidance despite updated 2015 guidelines recommending early introduction.

questions.verification_reason: Companies like Everlywell and naturopathic practitioners heavily market IgG food sensitivity tests direct-to-consumer online and in wellness clinics.
